name: Orson Scott Card

acts.description: Longtime board member of National Organization for Marriage; extensive advocacy against same-sex marriage and LGBTQ+ rights

behavior_summary: Author of Ender's Game, one of the most celebrated sci-fi novels ever written, has spent decades as an active advocate against LGBTQ+ rights and same-sex marriage.

art.summary: Ender's Game is one of the most read science fiction novels in history, particularly formative for young readers. Won both Hugo and Nebula awards.

verdict.blurb: He wrote a novel about the moral cost of annihilating an entire species and has spent his adult life actively working to deny his LGBTQ+ readers basic rights. Royalties from Ender's Game fund that work. He's still at it.
